incident_summary.title: A resource of type ECSCluster has executed a suspicious command.

decision_questions: 승인 전 ECS 클러스터 arn:aws:ecs:us-east-1:123456789012:cluster/sample-cluster 및 태스크 arn:aws:ecs:us-east-1:123456789012:task/sample-cluster/12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012 에 대한 운영 영향도를 확인할까요?
원격 통신 차단 전 공인 IP 198.51.100.0 이 정상 관리 채널인지 확인되었습니까?
VPC Flow Logs 활성화 대상 VPC vpc-generatedvpcid 에 대한 기존 로깅 정책과 비용 영향을 검토했습니까?
escalation_assessment.approval_notes: Level 1은 이미 수행되었습니다. 본 권고는 ECSCluster 의 의심 명령 실행에 대해 승인형 Level 2 및 Level 3 후보 플레이북을 제시합니다. EC2 전용 조치는 리소스 유형이 ECSCluster 이므로 제외했습니다.

reasoning_bullets: GuardDuty RuntimeMonitoring finding indicates a suspicious command executed in an ECSCluster context, requiring post-Level-1 escalation assessment.
Provided regulation chunks emphasize network restriction, segmentation, monitoring, alerting, and audit-log response after security events.
Candidate actions were filtered to exclude EC2-only actions because the incident resource type is ECSCluster, not EC2/Instance.

Level 2 focuses on lower-impact monitoring and selective network controls; Level 3 adds stronger containment using available higher-impact actions and additional containment-oriented controls from the provided action set.

regulations.excerpt: Monitor, encrypt and restrict communications between environments to only authenticated and authorized connections... Also VPC flow logs should be enabled to monitor anomalous network traffic.
regulations.why_relevant: 의심 명령 실행 이후 네트워크 통신 제한과 이상 트래픽 가시성 확보가 필요하므로, 공인 IP 198.51.100.0 관련 차단 검토와 VPC vpc-generatedvpcid 의 Flow Logs 활성화 근거가 됩니다.

regulations.excerpt: Applications and infrastructures should be configured such that access is appropriately segmented and segregated, monitored and restricted... to prevent lateral movement.
regulations.why_relevant: ECSCluster 내 의심 행위는 횡적 이동 가능성을 시사하므로, 네트워크 접근을 더 엄격히 제한하는 차단 조치와 분리 강화가 적절합니다.

regulations.excerpt: Identify and monitor security-related events within applications and the underlying infrastructure. Define and implement a system to generate alerts to responsible stakeholders.
regulations.why_relevant: 런타임 보안 이벤트에 대해 추가 모니터링과 경보 체계 보강이 필요하며, Flow Logs 활성화는 후속 탐지와 알림 운영을 지원합니다.

regulations.excerpt: Audit encryption and key management systems, policies, and processes... after any security event(s). ... assess compliance should be performed immediately after an incident.
regulations.why_relevant: 직접적인 키 침해 정황은 없지만, 보안 사고 직후 컴플라이언스 평가 필요성을 뒷받침하며 승인형 격리·모니터링 조치의 정당성을 보강합니다.

regulations.excerpt: Monitor security audit logs to detect activity outside of typical or expected patterns... review and take appropriate and timely actions on detected anomalies.
regulations.why_relevant: 비정상 명령 실행은 전형적인 이상 행위이므로, 신속한 대응과 추가 로깅 가시성 확보를 위한 네트워크 로그 활성화 및 차단 조치 검토가 필요합니다.

recommended_actions.description: Lower-impact response for the ECS suspicious command finding using monitoring-first controls and selective network restriction based on provided related regulatory actions.

selected_playbook.description: Lower-impact response for the ECS suspicious command finding using monitoring-first controls and selective network restriction based on provided related regulatory actions.

alternative_playbooks.description: Higher-impact containment candidate for the ECS suspicious command finding using stronger network containment and monitoring reinforcement from the available action set.
alternative_playbooks.why_not_selected: Not selected as primary response; router committed to L2. (High severity (9.0) but no L3 triggers → prefer L2.)

route_reasons: High severity (9.0) but no L3 triggers → prefer L2.
